## What
Brief summary of the change.

## Why
What problem this solves or what milestone it advances. Link the Phase 1 task number from [Phase1.md](../blob/main/Phase1.md#build-order-numbered-tasks) if applicable.

## Verification
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Preview URL opened and behaves as expected (UI changes only)

## Notes for reviewer
Anything non-obvious — calibration constants tuned, RNG seed used, engine-purity considerations, etc.
